# CWE-186 positive: overly restrictive validation regex (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-186-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
)

var peerHostPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-z]+$`)

// CWE-186 Overly Restrictive Regular Expression
// Vulnerable line: rejects numeric host labels so bad values slip later.
func CheckPeerHost(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	peer := r.URL.Query().Get("peer")
	if !peerHostPattern.MatchString(peer) {
		http.Error(w, "invalid", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"peer": peer})
}
